review_text: I dont understand the expense ratio thing. App shows 0.5% but my returns look lower than expected. Are there hidden charges nobody told me about?
Why is there a difference between direct and regular plan? Same fund but different NAV. Someone please explain in simple words.
Got charged an exit load when I redeemed early. There was no clear warning before I confirmed. Felt cheated honestly.
Love that direct plans have lower expense ratio, saved me money vs my old bank agent. But the fee breakup screen could be clearer.
What is this stamp duty deduction on my SIP? Small amount but no explanation anywhere in the app.
Expense ratio, exit load, stamp duty, TER... too many fee terms and no glossary. Please add a simple fee explainer.
They keep talking about TER but my statement doesnt match. Where exactly is the fee being cut from? Very confusing.
Good app for low cost investing, direct funds save a lot over time. Just wish fees were explained upfront before investing.
Is the platform itself charging me anything? I read its free but then what is this small deduction every month. Confusing.
KYC stuck for 10 days. They asked my PAN ABCDE1234F twice even though I completed KYC last year with another app. Useless process.
Onboarding is painful. Video KYC failed 4 times due to lighting. Almost gave up.
KYC verification took longer than promised but support eventually fixed it. 3 stars for the delay.
Priya Sharma here. My KYC shows pending for 2 weeks, my SIP could not start because of it. Extremely frustrating.
Re-KYC asked again randomly. Had to upload Aadhaar and PAN once more. Why is this not stored properly?
Redemption of Rs 50000 stuck for 8 days. Please call me back on 9123456780, no one is responding to my tickets.
Withdrawal took way longer than the 3 days they promised. Money finally came after a week. Stressful when you need funds.
Worst experience. Been calling +91 98765 43210 for a week about my redemption and zero response.
Partial redemption processed but the rest is pending with no status update. Communication is poor during withdrawals.
Redemption worked but the T+ timeline shown in app was misleading. Set correct expectations please.
My SIP of 5000 did not get deducted this month and the app shows no reason. Had to start it manually again.
SIP mandate failed silently. No SMS, no email, nothing. Found out only when I checked manually after a month.
SIP automation is smooth most months and pause feature is handy. Lost one star for the occasional mandate hiccup.
Wanted to change my SIP date from 5th to 10th, took 2 cycles to reflect. Should be instant.
Step-up SIP did not increase as scheduled. Reached support from rajesh.kumar88@gmail.com twice, still no fix.
App crashes every time I open the portfolio tab after the latest update. Pixel 7, Android 15.
Clean interface, easy to navigate, goal tracking is nice. Minor lag when loading charts but overall good.
Dark mode finally added, thank you. But the app logs me out too frequently.
Folio number 1234567/89 shows wrong balance after the update. A refresh sometimes fixes it, sometimes not. Buggy.
Honestly the best DIY investing app I have used. Fast, clean, and no pushy sales calls. Keep it up.
Support is basically a chatbot loop. Cannot reach a human. Raised a ticket 6 days ago, still open.
Email support replies after 4-5 days with copy paste answers that dont address the actual issue.
When I finally got a human on chat, they resolved my issue quickly. Just wish the wait was shorter.
No phone support at all. For a money app that is unacceptable. I stay in Banjara Hills Hyderabad 500034 and even the cheque was delayed.
Portfolio value updates a day late. NAV for my funds shows yesterdays figure during market hours. Confusing for tracking.
Invested amount reflected after 2 days. Made me anxious thinking the money was lost. Show pending transactions clearly.
XIRR calculation seems off compared to my own sheet. Or maybe NAV update lag is causing the mismatch.
Switched from a regular plan via agent to direct here and my costs dropped noticeably. Very happy with the transparency on holdings.
Great for beginners. Started my first SIP in minutes once KYC was done. The explainer content is helpful.
Reliable for long term SIP investing. No spam, no commissions. Would recommend to friends starting out.
Can the app just tell me which fund will give the highest returns next year? Why no buy recommendations?
I want the app to tell me whether to sell my equity funds now given the market. It refuses to advise, what is the point?
ELSS lock-in was not clearly flagged when I invested for tax saving. Found out about the 3 year lock only later. Add a warning.
